testcase.name: test_no_token_close_code_is_4401

failure.message:
AssertionError: spec requires WS close 4401; got http=403. Server must call await ws.accept() before ws.close(code=4401) so the close code is actually delivered to the client. assert ('http' == 'close'
- close + http)

testcase.failure: tests/test_ws_tracking.py:193: in test_no_token_close_code_is_4401 assert kind == "close" and code == 4401, ( E AssertionError: spec requires WS close 4401; got http=403. Server must call await ws.accept() before ws.close(code=4401) so the close code is actually delivered to the client. E assert ('http' == 'close' E E - close E + http)

testcase.name: test_unrelated_user_close_code_is_4403

failure.message:
AssertionError: spec requires WS close 4403; got http=403. Server must call await ws.accept() before ws.close(code=4403). assert ('http' == 'close'
- close + http)

testcase.failure: tests/test_ws_tracking.py:220: in test_unrelated_user_close_code_is_4403 assert kind == "close" and code == 4403, ( E AssertionError: spec requires WS close 4403; got http=403. Server must call await ws.accept() before ws.close(code=4403). E assert ('http' == 'close' E E - close E + http)
